title: cynanchum fragrans
intro: Cynanchum fragrans, also known as fragrant milkweed vine, is a type of plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Cynanchum fragrans include reducing fever, alleviating cough and asthma symptoms, and supporting the cardiovascular system. Cynanchum fragrans is typically prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
